merged_prs.title: [14_2_X] Backport tau embedding changes for 2024 production
[NanoAOD] Backport of #49137 (Fix puppi weight in PFCand table for reNanoV15) to 150X
[15_0_X]  Fix digi morphing (offline) out-of-bounds access
[DAQ] SFB mode detection of run end flag (15_0_X backport)
HLT menu development for `15_0_X` (11/N)
BPHNano: backport #49060 to CMSSW_15_0_X
[15_0_X] Digi Morphing for HLT
[15_0_X] Enabling SiPixel digi morphing from 2025 onward
[15_1_X]  Fix digi morphing (offline) out-of-bounds access
HLT menu development for `15_1_X` (1/N)
[DAQ] SFB mode detection of run end flag (15_1_X backport)
HLT menu development for `15_0_X` (11/N)  [`15_1_X`]
BPHNano: backport #49060 to CMSSW_15_1_X
[15_1_X] Enabling SiPixel digi morphing from 2025 onward
Clamp `fakePixels` to `maxFakesInModule`
Make python script `makeHLTMETValidationPlots.py` callable
[NanoAOD] Fix puppi weight in PFCand table for reNanoV15
Adding missing cmath header which was cleaned up in root master
Add missing cmath include in FWCore files
Changing https to http for CMS network in the uploadConditions script
Have HGCal SoA classes be storable by RNTuple
Switch from fmt external to std standard for formatting library
Fix digi morphing (offline) out-of-bounds access
Improve performance of heterogeneous CLUE.
Review: Allow defining valid range of Energy values for LHCInfoPerFill O2O
PerfTools/AllocMonitor: Update edmModuleAllocJsonToCircles.py to add "event setup" transition for ESProducers
Introduce new dEdX weights V19 HGCAL Geometry
[Hotfix] MET Validation: Division by zero
[NGT] Template LayerClusters associators to support both CaloCluster and PFCluster collections
cmsDriver.py "command line options" readiness for copy-paste
